title: All the Simple
description: A lightweight yet versatile modpack that balances simplicity with variety.
body:
# All the Simple > A light 1.21.1 modpack I put together for people who’ve been around the block—you know your way around mods and just want something that works, without the pointless grinding. > ⚠️ A few things first > 1. If you’re brand new to modded Minecraft, this pack might chew you up. It’s meant for players with some experience. > 2. Don't want a skyblock? Just set the world type to **default** when you create it, or open `server.properties` and change `level-type` to `minecraft:normal`. （The lastest version has changed the default settings to such） > 3. Official QQ group: **2151045360** — come say hi, ask questions, or find someone to play with. --- ## 📖 Table of Contents - [Pack Identity](#pack-identity) - [Core Highlights](#core-highlights) - [Four Quick Playstyles](#four-quick-playstyles) - [Questing & Guidance](#questing--guidance) - [Multiplayer Out-of-the-Box](#multiplayer-out-of-the-box) - [Shaders & Aesthetics](#shaders--aesthetics) - [Recommended Specs](#recommended-specs) - [Version Tags](#version-tags) - [Tweaks & Balance Notes](#tweaks--balance-notes) - [Gallery](#gallery) --- ## Pack Identity The idea behind this pack is pretty simple: you download it, you launch it, you play. No config tinkering, no wiki rabbit holes. Everything revolves around three things: - **Ready to go**: Download, unzip, hit launch. The pack handles the rest. - **Freedom, not filler**: Create is the backbone. Industry, magic, farming—do them in whatever order you like. No “month-long wait” recipes just to stretch playtime. - **Solo or together**: Finish it on your own or drag friends into it. We’ve tucked in voice chat, a QQ group bot, and FTB Teams so playing together feels seamless. --- ## Core Highlights ### 1. The whole Create family Create plus over 30 add-ons, covering everything from mining and enchanting to energy generation and dragon-slaying assembly lines. You get one long, satisfying tech chain. **Key Add-on Modules:** - Create: Dragons Plus — Automate dragons - Create: Enchantment Industry — Automate enchanting - Create: New Age — Power generation - Create: Ore Excavation — Automated mining - Create: Copycats+ — Building duplication - …and a bunch more for you to uncover. ### 2. Magic, minus the headache Ars Nouveau, Apotheosis, and Mahou Tsukai work together so you can just craft spells directly. No mana-node grinding, no arbitrary gates. We also tweaked enchantment caps so you can keep pushing as long as you have the materials. It’s magic that respects your time. ### 3. Actually fun farming Farmer’s Delight, Mystical Agriculture, and Ex Nihilo: Sequentia combine into a lazy kitchen-to-buff pipeline. Set up a few machines and watch food pile up—your inventory will never look like a lunchbox again. ### 4. Exploration and boss fights - **YUNG’s overhaul** polishes every vanilla structure into something worth trekking to. - **Four boss roads to walk**: - Ice & Fire: Community Edition - Cataclysm (L_Ender's Cataclysm) - Twilight Forest - Eternal Starlight - Loot from bosses isn’t trash—you can feed it back into Create setups or ProjectE. - Biomes O’ Plenty, Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone, and the whole Macaw block lineup mean you’ll be stopping to take screenshots every few steps. ### 5. Smooth performance Sodium’s optimization stack, FerriteCore, async particles, MemorySweep—we’ve thrown in everything so you can run shaders on 4 GB without wanting to pull your hair out. ### 6. No language friction Chinese translations update automatically, Pinyin search works out of the box, and IME conflicts are fixed. Search for anything in Chinese—no need to swap input methods. ### 7. Mods that talk to each other - L2 Series (L2Complements, L2Hostility, L2Weaponry) — Extra challenges - Industrial Foregoing — More industrial automation - Applied Energistics 2 — Modern storage & logistics - Mekanism — High-output tech - ProjectE — Equivalent exchange, your retirement plan --- ## Four Quick Playstyles ### 🔧 Mechanical Engineer ``` Copper → Zinc → Brass → Trains → Airships → Dragon-level power ``` **Endgame**: A fully automated dragon-slaying line, courtesy of Create’s Dragon+ modules. ### 🧙 Arcane Scholar ``` Ars Nouveau → spell automation → Apotheosis unlimited enchants → Mahou Tsukai gear ``` **Endgame**: One cast of “Annihilation Beam” that hits the damage ceiling. ### 🌾 Agri-Tycoon ``` Mystical Agriculture tier 6 essence → full Farmer’s Delight kitchen → ProjectE endgame ``` **Endgame**: Total resource freedom and early retirement. ### 📐 Redstone / Technical Player Schematics + Create + Custom Machinery **Endgame**: You’re a technical player. The endgame is tomorrow. Always tomorrow. --- ## Questing & Guidance - Lightweight FTB Quests—just a compass, not a cage. Play however you want. - Waystones + Xaero’s minimap & world map: fast travel and zero need to leave breadcrumbs. - Test dummies + damage display: check your DPS in one click, perfect for comparing gear. - GuideME: An in-game reference for everything in the pack. Click it, learn it. --- ## Multiplayer Out-of-the-Box - ✅ Simple Voice Chat baked right in. Log in, start talking. - ✅ QQ ⇄ Server bot: see group messages inside the game, reply without alt-tabbing. - ✅ LAN tweaks for quick dorm-room servers—up and running in about 90 seconds. - ✅ FTB Teams: share quest progress and Create machine permissions so nobody locks the other out. --- ## Shaders & Aesthetics ### Shader System - Iris and Sodium are already integrated. - Shaders are off by default. Flip to Complementary Reimagined with one click when you feel like it. ### UI Enhancement - ModernUI rounded corners - Colorful hearts (Colorful Hearts) - Item borders that don’t clog the screen - Clean, easy on the eyes, nothing fussy. ### Character Animation - “Yes Steve Model”: real-time skeletal animation that switches smoothly between first and third person. (Will remove instantly if any rights issue arises.) --- ## Recommended Specs | Component | Requirement | |-----------|-------------| | CPU | Intel i5-7th gen / Ryzen 5 3600 | | RAM | 4 GB allocated | | GPU | GTX 750 Ti / RX 588 | Tested: 1080p, 16 chunk render distance, 100–200 FPS. --- ## Version Tags | Type | Naming Convention | |------|-------------------| | Client | Release/Beta/Alpha + build + c/hd (+ fix + patch) | | Server | server-Release/Beta/Alpha + build + c/hd (+ fix + patch) | > **hd** — hardcore, includes L2 Hostility and its add-ons > **c** — the normal stuff, without L2 Hostility --- ## Tweaks & Balance Notes - 🍃 Mint spread rate adjusted - ✨ Apotheosis enchantment caps and rules changed - ⚖️ ProjectE values rebalanced - 🚫 Twilight Forest uncrafting table disabled - 💀 L2 difficulty tweaked --- ## Gallery Shader used: BSL 8.2 / 8.4 ![Screenshot 1](https://image.yangyang8002.xin/i/2025/08/19/e5sm6n.png) ![Screenshot 2](https://image.yangyang8002.xin/i/2025/08/19/e5rygj.png) ![Screenshot 3](https://image.yangyang8002.xin/i/2025/08/19/e5s9ym.png) ![Screenshot 4](https://image.yangyang8002.xin/i/2025/08/19/e5rxsd.png) ---
**Made with ❤️ by All the Simple Team**
--- # All the Simple > 这是为 1.21.1 搓的一个轻量魔改包，如果你已经玩过一些模组，想找一份省心、能爽快自动化的整合体验，它应该很对你胃口。 > ⚠️ 提前说几句 > 1. 这包是给有模组基础的人准备的，刚入坑的话可能会有点懵，别勉强。 > 2. 不想玩空岛？建世界的时候把类型选成默认就行，或者到 server.properties 里把 level-type 改成 minecraft:normal。（最新版已经改动成默认了） > 3. 官方交流群：**2151045360**，欢迎来聊天、提问、抓人联机。 --- ## 📖 目录 - [整合包定位](#一整合包定位) - [核心特色](#二核心特色) - [玩法路线](#三四条主线速览) - [任务与引导](#四任务与引导) - [多人联机](#五多人联机即开) - [视觉美化](#六光影与美化) - [系统要求](#七推荐配置) - [版本说明](#八版本声明) - [魔改说明](#九魔改声明) - [实机截图](#十游玩实图) --- ## 一、整合包定位 做这个包的想法挺简单：打开就能玩，不用调一堆配置；路线自由，不硬拽着你肝。 概括起来就三点： - **开箱即玩**：下载、解压、启动，剩下的事包都帮你办好了。 - **不卡你不拖你**：Create 机械动力是主轴，工业、魔法、农业三条线想怎么走就怎么走，没有阴间配方故意拖时间。 - **单人能毕业，联机更好玩**：自己慢慢折腾也能到头，拉上朋友更热闹。内置语音、QQ 群 bot、FTB 团队系统都准备好了。 --- ## 二、核心特色 ### 1. 机械动力全家桶 Create 带上三十几个扩展，挖矿、附魔、能源到龙息发电，一条完整的机械科技线直接铺好。 组装流水线的乐趣，这里管够。 **主要扩展模组：** - Create: Dragons Plus —— 龙类自动化 - Create: Enchantment Industry —— 附魔自动化 - Create: New Age —— 能源与发电 - Create: Ore Excavation —— 矿物开采 - Create: Copycats+ —— 建筑复制 - 更多内容留给你自己探索…… ### 2. 轻量魔法 新生魔艺、神化和魔法使搭在一起，法术直接合成，不卡灵力、不卡阶段。附魔等级我们也重新调过，拿到材料就能一直往上升，玩的就是一个痛快。 ### 3. 快乐农业 农夫乐事、神秘农业加上无中生有：神赐，凑出一条从种菜、做饭到吃 buff 的全自动厨房。机器一摆，食物成箱出，背包再也不用塞满吃的。 ### 4. 观光与冒险 - **YUNG 系列结构优化**：原版的矿洞、要塞、神殿全给翻修了一遍，养眼又值得探。 - **四条 Boss 线等你打**： - 冰火传说社区版（Ice & Fire: Community Edition） - 灾变（L_Ender's Cataclysm） - 暮色森林（Twilight Forest） - 永恒星光（Eternal Starlight） - Boss 掉的破烂别扔，Create 产线和 ProjectE 都能回收再利用。 - 地形丰富到爆，超多生物群系（Biomes O' Plenty、Oh The Biomes We've Gone）加上 Macaw 全套建筑方块，喜欢逛图造景的人有福了。 ### 5. 性能 & 体验 Sodium 全系列优化、FerriteCore 内存治理、MemorySweep 清垃圾，还给粒子加了异步处理。亲测分 4 GB 内存，光影能流畅跑起来。 ### 6. 完全本地化 自动汉化、拼音搜索、输入法冲突全部修好，搜物品敲中文就行，不用来回切输入法。 ### 7. 多模组联动 - L2 系列（L2Complements、L2Hostility、L2Weaponry）—— 额外挑战 - Industrial Foregoing —— 更多工业自动化 - Applied Energistics 2 —— 现代存储与物流 - Mekanism —— 高产科技线 - ProjectE —— 等价交换，给你养老的底气 --- ## 三、玩法路线 ### 🔧 机械工程师 ``` 铜 → 锌 → 黄铜 → 火车 → 飞艇 → 龙力发电机 ``` **最终目标**：用 Create 的龙+模块全自动击杀末影龙。 ### 🧙 魔法学者 ``` 新生魔艺 → 法术自动化 → 神化无限附魔 → 魔法使灵装 ``` **最终目标**：一发威力拉满的“湮灭光束”。 ### 🌾 农场大亨 ``` 神秘农业 6 级精华 → 农民乐事全套厨房 → ProjectE 等价交换 ``` **最终目标**：资源完全自由，提前养老。 ### 📐 生电玩家 投影 + Create + Custom Machinery **最终目标**：别问，生电人的毕业日永远是明天。 --- ## 四、任务与引导 - **轻量级 FTB 任务**：只指个方向，不强迫进度，怎么开心怎么来。 - **指引石 + Xaero 地图全家桶**：传送点、大地图、小地图全齐，想去哪就去哪。 - **试验假人 + 伤害显示**：一键测 DPS，换装备效果立竿见影。 - **GuideME**：游戏里随时翻的整合指南，哪里不懂点哪里。 --- ## 五、多人联机即开 - ✅ 内置 Simple Voice Chat，进服就能聊。 - ✅ QQ 群 ⇄ 服务器双向 Bot，在游戏里也能看到群消息。 - ✅ 自定义局域网联机优化，宿舍开黑几分钟完事。 - ✅ FTB Teams：任务进度和 Create 机械权限队友共享，不用各搞各的。 --- ## 六、视觉美化 ### 光影系统 - Iris + Sodium 已整合好了。 - 光影默认关着，需要时一键切到 Complementary Reimagined。 ### UI 美化 - ModernUI 圆角界面 - 彩色血条（Colorful Hearts） - 物品边框（Item Borders） - 整体干净清爽，不挡游戏画面 ### 角色动画 - Yes Steve Model：实时骨骼动画，第一和第三人称切换很自然（侵权会直接删）。 --- ## 七、推荐配置 | 硬件 | 要求 | |------|------| | CPU | Intel i5-7 代 / Ryzen 5-3600 | | 内存 | 4 GB 分配给游戏 | | 显卡 | GTX 750Ti / RX 588 | **实测**：1080p，16 区块视距，帧数能稳在 100–200。 --- ## 八、版本说明 | 端 | 命名规则 | |----|----------| | 客户端 | Release/Beta/Alpha + 版本号 + c/hd (+ fix + 修复号) | | 服务端 | server-Release/Beta/Alpha + 版本号 + c/hd (+ fix + 修复号) | > **hd**：硬核版，包含莱特兰-恶意（L2）及其附属 > **c**：普通版，不含莱特兰恶意相关内容 --- ## 九、魔改说明 - 🍃 薄荷扩散速率调整 - ✨ 神化附魔等级与规则修改 - ⚖️ ProjectE 数值平衡调整 - 🚫 暮色森林拆解台禁用 - 💀 莱特兰难度调整 --- ## 十、实机截图 光影：BSL 8.2 / 8.4 ![截图1](https://image.yangyang8002.xin/i/2025/08/19/e5sm6n.png) ![截图2](https://image.yangyang8002.xin/i/2025/08/19/e5rygj.png) ![截图3](https://image.yangyang8002.xin/i/2025/08/19/e5s9ym.png) ![截图4](https://image.yangyang8002.xin/i/2025/08/19/e5rxsd.png) ---
**Made with ❤️ by All the Simple Team**
